text:
Created attachment 181096
Patch from 1.6.4 to 2.4.7, revision 2

Hello,

I did some fixes to the patch.
check-plist, stage-qa seem to be good.

Never versions require more work, so I wanted to push the version first because it significantly newer anyways (Jun 1, 2016 vs Jan 7, 2015).
